properties.remark: *** 1 FATAL *** A FAMILY OF 4 HAD PARTIALLY CROSSED THE BED OF THE AGUA FRIA RIVER WHEN FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED AND PREVENTED THEM FROM PROCEEDING. SWIFT WATER RESCUE WAS IMPOSSIBLE AND A HELICOPTER COULD NOT BE DISPATCHED DUE TO WEATHER CONDITIONS. THE 6-YEAR-OLD BOY WAS SUBSEQUENTLY SWEPT DOWNSTREAM AND DROWNED.
